title: bulk-migration-planner inputs
description: Typed inputs for the bulk-migration-planner runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

direction.description: Example from AGENT.md: `inbound` (into SF) / `outbound` (out of SF) / `bidirectional`

source_or_target.description: Example from AGENT.md: `SAP S/4HANA`, `Snowflake`, `Salesforce Marketing Cloud`, `Kafka`
